subcodes.title: Public address given on 1913-01-28
subcodes.first_line: Now praise be to God that his holiness Bahá'u'lláh hath appeared. He has upraised the flag of divine civilization, He has opened the doors of the Kingdom of God
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @light and darkness
